title: B@thuwl #1329
definition:
Bethul = "God destroys" or "man of God" or "dweller in God"

 1) a town of Simeon in the south (also spelled 'Bethuel')
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bethul = "God destroys" or "man of God" or "dweller in God"

 1) a town of Simeon in the south (also spelled 'Bethuel')

    NASB:  a place in Simeon
